package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerParsesConfigOrFeatureFlagsInline() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_parses_config_or_feature_flags_inline"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that read feature flags, tenant configuration, or rollout toggles directly instead of using injected policy/config abstractions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
